_README: Talosix MCP Server Configuration for Claude Desktop / Claude Teams. Copy desired servers into your claude_desktop_config.json under 'mcpServers'. Replace all <PLACEHOLDER> values with your actual credentials.

mcpServers._comment_core: === CORE INTEGRATIONS (Essential for all team members) ===

mcp-atlassian._description: Jira + Confluence - project management and documentation

github._description: GitHub - PRs, issues, code review, branch management
github._setup: Create personal access token: https://github.com/settings/tokens (scopes: repo, read:org)

slack._setup: Create Slack app: https://api.slack.com/apps -> Bot Token Scopes: channels:history, channels:read, chat:write, users:read

figma._description: Figma - read designs, extract tokens, components. Supports Code to Canvas.
figma._setup: Auth happens in Claude: type /mcp -> select figma -> Authenticate -> Allow Access

postgres._description: PostgreSQL - direct database queries and schema analysis
postgres._setup: Use your database connection string. For read-only safety, use a read replica or read-only user.

brave-search._description: Web search via Brave Search API - competitive intel, research, lead gen
brave-search._setup: Get free API key (2000 queries/mo): https://brave.com/search/api/

pubmed._description: PubMed - search medical/clinical trial research articles
pubmed._setup: Get free NCBI API key: https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/account/settings/ (increases rate limit)

sequential-thinking._description: Structured reasoning for complex multi-step problems - architecture, debugging, planning
sequential-thinking._setup: No API key needed. Just install.

memory._description: Persistent memory across conversations using a knowledge graph
memory._setup: No API key needed. Stores data locally.

filesystem._description: Read/write/search local files - useful for working with documents
filesystem._setup: Specify which directories Claude can access. Add paths to the args array.

stitch._description: Google Stitch (formerly Galileo AI) - AI wireframe and UI generation

canva._description: Canva - create and edit designs, presentations, social media graphics

firecrawl._description: Web scraping - crawl websites, extract structured data, competitive intelligence
firecrawl._setup: Get API key: https://firecrawl.dev (free tier: 500 credits/month)

microsoft-teams._description: Microsoft Teams - messages, channels, meeting transcripts (via Microsoft Graph)
microsoft-teams._setup: Requires Azure AD app registration with delegated permissions: ChannelMessage.Read, Chat.Read, OnlineMeetings.Read. See: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/graph/auth-register-app-v2

playwright._description: Browser automation - testing, screenshots, web interaction

playwright_headless._description: Headless browser automation - background web tasks
